texts.label: text
texts.orig: 'Hybrid models work because nature is partly lawful and partly inconvenient'
texts.text: 'Hybrid models work because nature is partly lawful and partly inconvenient'

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 'Hybrid' doesn't mean half-physics, half-data. It means using physics to decide what must be learned - and data to learn just that
texts.text: 'Hybrid' doesn't mean half-physics, half-data. It means using physics to decide what must be learned - and data to learn just that

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Hybrid models are like giving machine learning a physics teacher-so it can't cheat by memorizing the answers
texts.text: Hybrid models are like giving machine learning a physics teacher-so it can't cheat by memorizing the answers

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At the end of the day, hybrid models are…
texts.text: At the end of the day, hybrid models are…
